highLegibilityFont.title: Clear-eye font
highLegibilityFont.desc: Use a font for sharp eyes instead o' the standard scrawl

themeIsAmoled.title: Black Hole mode
themeIsAmoled.desc: Use a total black background when sailin' at night. Keeps yer glass from wearin' out.

themeIsVibrant.title: Vibrant colors
themeIsVibrant.desc: Bring more color to the deck.

useAccentColor.title: Accent color
useAccentColor.desc: Use a custom color for yer flag
